SALES_MANAGER.name: Sales Manager
SALES_MANAGER.desc: Sales department head responsible for final order approval, sales planning, and pricing strategy

SALES_PERSON.name: Sales Representative
SALES_PERSON.desc: Standard sales staff responsible for customer relations, quoting, and order follow-up

SALES_OPERATOR.name: Sales Clerk
SALES_OPERATOR.desc: Clerical support role responsible for order entry, document filing, and workflow follow-up

PURCHASE_MANAGER.name: Procurement Manager
PURCHASE_MANAGER.desc: Procurement department head responsible for sourcing, cost control, and settlement approval

PURCHASE_PERSON.name: Procurement Specialist
PURCHASE_PERSON.desc: Standard procurement staff responsible for vendor comparison, purchase planning, and supplier follow-up

PURCHASE_OPERATOR.name: Procurement Clerk
PURCHASE_OPERATOR.desc: Clerical support role responsible for purchase order entry, delivery follow-up, and document management

PRODUCTION_MANAGER.name: Shop Floor Manager
PRODUCTION_MANAGER.desc: Shop floor head responsible for production scheduling, quality coordination, and delivery alignment

PRODUCTION_TEAM_LEADER.name: Team Leader
PRODUCTION_TEAM_LEADER.desc: Work team lead responsible for task assignment, progress tracking, and exception reporting

PRODUCTION_CLERK.name: Production Clerk
PRODUCTION_CLERK.desc: Production clerk responsible for work order maintenance, data entry, and report consolidation

PRODUCTION_STAFF.name: Production Operator
PRODUCTION_STAFF.desc: Frontline production staff responsible for executing operations per routing and process feedback

WAREHOUSE_MANAGER.name: Warehouse Supervisor
WAREHOUSE_MANAGER.desc: Warehouse department head responsible for inventory strategy and physical asset security

WAREHOUSE_OPERATOR.name: Warehouse Operator
WAREHOUSE_OPERATOR.desc: Warehouse execution staff responsible for inbound/outbound transactions, cycle counts, and shipping/receiving

FINANCE_MANAGER.name: Finance Manager
FINANCE_MANAGER.desc: Finance department head responsible for treasury coordination and cost accounting

FINANCE_OPERATOR.name: Accounting Specialist
FINANCE_OPERATOR.desc: Finance execution staff responsible for reconciliation, invoicing, and voucher entry

QUALITY_MANAGER.name: Quality Manager
QUALITY_MANAGER.desc: Quality department head responsible for quality standards and arbitration decisions

QUALITY_OPERATOR.name: Quality Inspector
QUALITY_OPERATOR.desc: Quality execution staff responsible for incoming, in-process, and finished goods inspection

EMPLOYEE.name: General Employee
EMPLOYEE.desc: General functional access with basic read-only permissions

approval_approved.name: Approval Approved Notification
approval_approved.desc: In-app message sent when an approval request is approved

approval_rejected.name: Approval Rejected Notification
approval_rejected.desc: In-app message sent when an approval request is rejected

HAOLIGO_EQUIPMENT_SPOT_CHECK_REPORT.name: Equipment Spot Check Exception Report
HAOLIGO_EQUIPMENT_SPOT_CHECK_REPORT.desc: In-app message sent to selected recipients when a spot check is saved with reporting enabled

HAOLIGO_EQUIPMENT_ROUTE_PATROL_REPORT.name: Route Patrol Exception Report
HAOLIGO_EQUIPMENT_ROUTE_PATROL_REPORT.desc: In-app message sent to selected recipients when a route patrol record is saved with reporting enabled

HAOLIGO_PATROL_ISSUE_REGISTER_REPORT.name: Field Patrol Issue Registration Report
HAOLIGO_PATROL_ISSUE_REGISTER_REPORT.desc: In-app message sent to selected recipients when an issue is registered with reporting enabled

HAOLIGO_PATROL_ISSUE_REMEDIATED.name: Field Patrol Issue Remediated
HAOLIGO_PATROL_ISSUE_REMEDIATED.desc: Notifies the registrant and related personnel when a hazard status changes to remediated

HAOLIGO_MOLD_TRIAL_SUBMITTED.name: Mold Trial Pending Approval Reminder
HAOLIGO_MOLD_TRIAL_SUBMITTED.desc: Notifies designated reviewers when a mold trial is created or resubmitted for approval

HAOLIGO_MOLD_TRIAL_APPROVED.name: Mold Trial Approved Notification
HAOLIGO_MOLD_TRIAL_APPROVED.desc: Notifies the requester and trial personnel when a mold trial is approved (non-failure workflow)

HAOLIGO_MOLD_TRIAL_REJECTED.name: Mold Trial Rejected Notification
HAOLIGO_MOLD_TRIAL_REJECTED.desc: Notifies the requester when a mold trial is rejected

HAOLIGO_MOLD_TRIAL_FAILURE_PENDING.name: Mold Trial Failure Pending Action Reminder
HAOLIGO_MOLD_TRIAL_FAILURE_PENDING.desc: Notifies designated personnel when a failed trial is marked pending action (external partners notified after transfer)

HAOLIGO_MOLD_TRIAL_ADJUSTMENT_COMPLETE.name: Mold Trial Adjustment Complete Notification
HAOLIGO_MOLD_TRIAL_ADJUSTMENT_COMPLETE.desc: Notifies the requester and designated personnel when adjustment is confirmed by external partner or internal team

HAOLIGO_MOLD_TRIAL_FAILURE_REPAIR.name: Mold Trial Failure Immediate Repair Notification
HAOLIGO_MOLD_TRIAL_FAILURE_REPAIR.desc: Notifies trial personnel and supplier-linked users when a failed trial is sent for immediate repair

HAOLIGO_MOLD_TRIAL_PRODUCTION_PENDING.name: Mold Trial Production Run Pending Reminder
HAOLIGO_MOLD_TRIAL_PRODUCTION_PENDING.desc: Notifies trial production inspectors to enter results after trial approval enters production run stage

HAOLIGO_MOLD_TRIAL_RECALLED.name: Mold Trial Recalled and Closed Notification
HAOLIGO_MOLD_TRIAL_RECALLED.desc: Notifies related personnel after a failed mold trial is recalled and closed

HAOLIGO_MOLD_OUTSOURCE_MAINTENANCE_PENDI.name: Outsource Maintenance Pending Approval Reminder
HAOLIGO_MOLD_OUTSOURCE_MAINTENANCE_PENDI.desc: Notifies external partner users when an outsource maintenance order is submitted or resubmitted for approval

HAOLIGO_MOLD_OUTSOURCE_MAINTENANCE_APPRO.name: Outsource Maintenance Approved Notification
HAOLIGO_MOLD_OUTSOURCE_MAINTENANCE_APPRO.desc: Notifies the requester and external partner users when an outsource maintenance order is approved

HAOLIGO_MOLD_OUTSOURCE_MAINTENANCE_REJEC.name: Outsource Maintenance Rejected Notification
HAOLIGO_MOLD_OUTSOURCE_MAINTENANCE_REJEC.desc: Notifies the requester when an outsource maintenance order is rejected

HAOLIGO_MOLD_OUTSOURCE_MAINTENANCE_REVOK.name: Outsource Maintenance Approval Revoked Notification
HAOLIGO_MOLD_OUTSOURCE_MAINTENANCE_REVOK.desc: Notifies related personnel when an outsource maintenance approval is revoked

HAOLIGO_MOLD_MAINTENANCE_PENDING.name: In-House Maintenance Pending Approval Reminder
HAOLIGO_MOLD_MAINTENANCE_PENDING.desc: Notifies related personnel when an in-house maintenance/repair order enters pending approval

HAOLIGO_MOLD_MAINTENANCE_APPROVED.name: In-House Maintenance Approved Notification
HAOLIGO_MOLD_MAINTENANCE_APPROVED.desc: Notifies the requester when an in-house maintenance/repair order is approved

HAOLIGO_MOLD_MAINTENANCE_REJECTED.name: In-House Maintenance Rejected Notification
HAOLIGO_MOLD_MAINTENANCE_REJECTED.desc: Notifies the requester when an in-house maintenance/repair order is rejected

HAOLIGO_MOLD_MAINTENANCE_REVOKED.name: In-House Maintenance Approval Revoked Notification
HAOLIGO_MOLD_MAINTENANCE_REVOKED.desc: Notifies related personnel when an in-house maintenance approval is revoked

HAOLIGO_MOLD_MAINTENANCE_COMPLETE_CREATE.name: In-House Maintenance Completion Created Notification
HAOLIGO_MOLD_MAINTENANCE_COMPLETE_CREATE.desc: Notifies the requester when an in-house maintenance/repair completion record is created

HAOLIGO_MOLD_OUTSOURCE_COMPLETE_PENDING.name: Outsource Maintenance Completion Pending Approval Reminder
HAOLIGO_MOLD_OUTSOURCE_COMPLETE_PENDING.desc: Notifies the requester and source maintenance personnel when an external partner submits a completion record

HAOLIGO_MOLD_OUTSOURCE_COMPLETE_APPROVED.name: Outsource Maintenance Completion Approved Notification
HAOLIGO_MOLD_OUTSOURCE_COMPLETE_APPROVED.desc: Notifies the requester and external partner users when an outsource completion record is approved

HAOLIGO_MOLD_OUTSOURCE_COMPLETE_REJECTED.name: Outsource Maintenance Completion Rejected Notification
HAOLIGO_MOLD_OUTSOURCE_COMPLETE_REJECTED.desc: Notifies the requester when an outsource completion record is rejected

HAOLIGO_MOLD_OUTSOURCE_COMPLETE_REVOKED.name: Outsource Maintenance Completion Approval Revoked Notification
HAOLIGO_MOLD_OUTSOURCE_COMPLETE_REVOKED.desc: Notifies the requester and source maintenance personnel when an outsource completion approval is revoked

HAOLIGO_EQUIPMENT_UPKEEP_SHEET_CREATED.name: Equipment Maintenance Order Created Notification
HAOLIGO_EQUIPMENT_UPKEEP_SHEET_CREATED.desc: Notifies the requester when an equipment maintenance/repair order is created

HAOLIGO_EQUIPMENT_UPKEEP_COMPLETE_CREATE.name: Equipment Maintenance Completion Created Notification
HAOLIGO_EQUIPMENT_UPKEEP_COMPLETE_CREATE.desc: Notifies the requester when an equipment maintenance completion record is created

machining.name: Machining
machining.desc: Common operations for subtractive and precision machining such as cutting, grinding, and drilling/tapping

injection_molding.name: Injection Molding
injection_molding.desc: Common operations for injection molding, machine setup, tooling, and post-processing

sheet_metal.name: Sheet Metal
sheet_metal.desc: Common operations for blanking, forming, welding, and surface finishing

electronics_assembly.name: Electronics Assembly
electronics_assembly.desc: Common operations for SMT, through-hole assembly, testing, and packaging

die_casting.name: Die Casting
die_casting.desc: Common operations for die casting, deburring, and post-machining

general_assembly.name: Mechanical Assembly & Final Assembly
general_assembly.desc: Sub-assembly, final assembly, commissioning, and final inspection/packaging

wire_harness.name: Wire Harness & Connectors
wire_harness.desc: Automotive/industrial wire harness operations: cutting/stripping, crimping, welding, assembly, and electrical testing

powder_metallurgy.name: Powder Metallurgy
powder_metallurgy.desc: Common operations for compaction, sintering, and post-processing

forging.name: Forging
forging.desc: Common operations for hot die forging, trimming, heat treatment, and NDT inspection

rubber_molding.name: Rubber Molding & Vulcanization
rubber_molding.desc: Common operations for seals, dampers, and other rubber product manufacturing

pcb_fabrication.name: PCB Fabrication
pcb_fabrication.desc: Common multilayer PCB operations including drilling, plating, etching, and electrical testing

wood_panel.name: Panel Furniture & Wood Products
wood_panel.desc: Common operations for cutting, edge banding, drilling, and painting
